title: Ubiquiti AirWire, Wi-Fi 7 USB-C adapter
description: The Ubiquiti U-AirWire is a high-speed USB-C dual-band Wi-Fi 7 adapter with an integrated directional antenna, supporting STR MLO for simultaneous, aggregated use of the 5GHz and 6GHz bands , delivering full-duplex connectivity and significantly higher throughput. In Enhanced mode, it achieves speeds of up to 10Gbps (5Gbps full-duplex). It requires a UniFi WiFi AP and is compatible with older models, however STR MLO functionality requires a UniFi U7 or E7 Device USB C-C cable
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 5 + 6 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11ac, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4300 Transmission speed - 6GHz [Mb/s] 5800 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 25 Tx power 6GHz [dBm] 20 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 6GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Fixed Antenna gain [dBi] 11 Connectors and Interfaces Interface USB Type-C Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 40 Width [mm] 117 Height [mm] 43 Depth [mm] 117 General Type of network card WLAN
